title: Lies, damned lies, and evals
description: Why you-agent-factory operators should judge workflow health from operational evidence—throughput, failures, queue and harness pressure—rather than model benchmark leaderboards alone.
contextSentence: A high model benchmark score does not tell you whether a long-running you-agent-factory workflow is healthy. Operators need operational evidence from the factory itself.
takeaway: Evaluate agent-factory workflows with live operational signals—completions and failures over time, queue or harness saturation, token pressure, and session metrics—not with model leaderboard ranks that answer a different question.
